campaign: Solace Skin Lab — August Meta Ads V2
location: Cielo Vista Mall, El Paso, TX

monthlyStrategy.primaryGoal: Generate qualified calls and consultation inquiries while building a reusable local retargeting audience.

budgetAllocation.purpose: Introduce facials, LED and the Solace consultation-first approach to new local audiences.
Promote the approved luxury-skincare/free-facial and Tuesday 2×1 offers without inventing terms.
Re-engage recent page, profile, video and website visitors with consultation and booking messages.

audienceFramework: Prospecting: broad local adults within a practical service radius of Cielo Vista Mall; avoid targeting or copy that infers sensitive health conditions.
Offer ads involving wine: restrict delivery to age 21+ and retain the explicit 21+ qualifier.
Retargeting: recent Facebook/Instagram engagers, video viewers and website visitors when those audiences are available.
Exclusions: exclude recent confirmed bookings or converted leads when reliable customer lists and consent are available.
Use English copy for the approved campaign; create a separate Spanish test only after client approval rather than mixing languages in one ad.

weeklyFlight.actions: Launch brand/facial and LED ads. Build engaged-video and profile audiences. Establish baseline creative and message performance.
Run the skincare/free-facial offer and Tuesday 2×1 ad. Add BOTOX® Cosmetic consultation messaging only after regulatory review.
Introduce microneedling and JUVÉDERM® consultation ads. Retarget people who engaged during weeks 1–2.
Rotate the second offer creative, the final Tuesday creative and the general consultation ad. Shift allocation toward ads producing qualified inquiries—not clicks alone.

measurement: Primary: qualified phone calls, consultation inquiries and confirmed bookings.
Secondary: cost per qualified inquiry, landing-page or profile-view rate, saves, video engagement and frequency.
Do not choose winners on click-through rate alone; review lead quality and booking outcome.
Review placements and comments regularly; pause misleading, low-quality or policy-sensitive delivery.
Use Meta Pixel/Conversions API and UTMs if the booking destination supports them.
testingRules: Test one major variable at a time: copy angle, creative or audience—not all three simultaneously.
Use the approved 1:1 campaign creatives in feeds; adapt safe crops for Stories/Reels only after visual QA.
Rotate creative when frequency rises and response quality declines.
Reallocate the existing monthly budget toward qualified-inquiry winners; do not increase total spend without approval.

ads.name: Real Skin — Local Awareness
ads.audience: Broad local adults around Cielo Vista Mall; exclude confirmed recent customers when appropriate.
ads.primaryTextA: Real skin deserves thoughtful care—not a one-size-fits-all promise. Solace Skin Lab begins with your goals and a conversation about the next step that may fit. Call (915) 995-9524 to learn more.
ads.primaryTextB: Smart skincare starts with clarity. Explore personalized facials, LED Light Therapy and consultation-led aesthetic care at Solace Skin Lab in El Paso. Call (915) 995-9524.
ads.destination: Client-approved booking page or phone call
ads.optimization: Reach or video/engagement quality; build retargeting pools.
ads.compliance: No outcome guarantees or personal-attribute language.

ads.name: Facial + LED Experience
ads.audience: Broad local skincare audience; retarget engaged users with variation B.
ads.primaryTextA: A personalized facial plan may include LED Light Therapy when appropriate and available. Discover a calm, consultation-led experience at Solace Skin Lab. Call (915) 995-9524 to ask about availability.
ads.primaryTextB: Modern skincare can still feel personal. Ask how a facial and LED Light Therapy may fit into a thoughtful care plan. Availability and individual experiences vary. Call (915) 995-9524.
ads.compliance: Avoid clinical-result claims; verify service availability.

ads.name: Luxury Skincare + Free Facial Offer
ads.audience: Local prospecting plus recent engagers; exclude converted offer leads when possible.
ads.primaryTextA: GET A FREE FACIAL. WITH THE PURCHASE OF ANY LUXURY SKINCARE PRODUCT • ONLY $64.99. Call Solace Skin Lab at (915) 995-9524 to confirm eligible products, availability and complete offer terms.
ads.primaryTextB: Bring your skincare routine and in-spa care together. GET A FREE FACIAL. WITH THE PURCHASE OF ANY LUXURY SKINCARE PRODUCT • ONLY $64.99. Call (915) 995-9524 for eligible products and complete terms.
ads.description: Eligible products, availability and complete terms must be confirmed.
ads.optimization: Qualified offer calls and confirmed redemptions.
ads.compliance: Do not launch until the client confirms what $64.99 covers, eligible products, limits, dates and exclusions.

ads.name: Tuesday 2×1 Rotation
ads.audience: Local age 21+ prospecting and retargeting; schedule around the eligible Tuesday window.
ads.primaryTextA: TUESDAY 2×1 + WINE + 2 FREE FACIALS. Call Solace Skin Lab at (915) 995-9524 for complete offer terms, eligibility, restrictions and availability. Wine available only to guests age 21+.
ads.primaryTextB: Make Tuesday the self-care plan. TUESDAY 2×1 + WINE + 2 FREE FACIALS. Call (915) 995-9524 to verify eligibility, restrictions, availability and complete terms. Wine available only to guests age 21+.
ads.description: Restrictions apply • Availability varies • Wine 21+ only
ads.compliance: Keep offer wording literal. Client must confirm dates, 2×1 meaning, free-service relationship, limits and alcohol terms before activation.

ads.name: BOTOX® Cosmetic Consultation
ads.audience: Local adults in an appropriate age range; broad targeting without inferring insecurity or a medical condition.
ads.primaryTextA: Considering BOTOX® Cosmetic starts with an informed consultation. Discuss suitability, potential risks, natural movement and realistic expectations before deciding whether treatment is appropriate. Individual results vary. Call (915) 995-9524.
ads.primaryTextB: Questions should come before treatment. A Solace consultation can cover BOTOX® Cosmetic suitability, potential risks and realistic expectations. Individual results vary. Call (915) 995-9524.
ads.destination: Phone call or compliant consultation form
ads.optimization: Qualified consultation inquiries, not low-intent clicks.
ads.compliance: Requires client/manufacturer/regulatory review and any applicable Important Safety Information before activation.

ads.name: Microneedling Consultation
ads.audience: Broad local adults interested in aesthetic skincare; never target or address someone as having a sensitive condition.
ads.primaryTextA: Microneedling may be considered as part of a personalized approach to the appearance of certain acne scars, healed scar texture, fine lines or scalp concerns. Suitability and individual results vary. Call (915) 995-9524 to request an evaluation.
ads.primaryTextB: A microneedling plan should begin with an individual evaluation—not a promise. Ask whether the service may be appropriate for specific texture, fine-line or scalp goals. Individual results vary. Call (915) 995-9524.
ads.description: Suitability, treatment needs and results vary.
ads.destination: Client-approved consultation page or phone call
ads.compliance: No guaranteed improvement, diagnosis, hair-growth promise or before/after implication.

ads.name: JUVÉDERM® Consultation
ads.audience: Local adults; broad targeting without personal-attribute or insecurity language.
ads.primaryTextA: A JUVÉDERM® lip filler conversation should begin with your goals, suitability, potential risks and realistic expectations. Individual results vary. Call Solace Skin Lab at (915) 995-9524 to request a consultation.
ads.primaryTextB: Interested in learning about JUVÉDERM® for lip filler? Start with an informed consultation covering suitability, potential risks and expectations. Individual results vary. Call (915) 995-9524.
ads.destination: Phone call or compliant consultation form
ads.compliance: Requires client/manufacturer/regulatory review and any applicable Important Safety Information before activation.

ads.name: Warm Audience — Choose Your Next Step
ads.audience: Recent Facebook/Instagram engagers, video viewers and website visitors; exclude confirmed recent bookings when possible.
ads.primaryTextA: Still exploring the right next step? Solace Skin Lab can help organize the questions around your goals, suitability and available services. Call (915) 995-9524 to request a consultation.
ads.primaryTextB: Clear information comes before a confident decision. Reconnect with Solace Skin Lab to discuss the service that may fit your goals. Call (915) 995-9524.
ads.description: Cielo Vista Mall • El Paso, TX
ads.destination: Phone call or client-approved booking page
ads.compliance: Keep service claims measured and do not imply guaranteed eligibility or outcomes.
